steps.title: Follow Balmy Alley's development
steps.content: The text introduces San Francisco murals, then focuses on Balmy Alley. It gives the murals' 1970s origin, explains how later artists painted new murals over fading ones, and ends by describing Balmy Alley as a living showcase of the city's artistic spirit.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: Choice A says the text compares Balmy Alley with other murals, but it does not. Choice C invents a call to protect murals. Choice D focuses only on the rise of mural painting and misses Balmy Alley's importance. The answer is B.
